description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
Fixed & Improved

Restore pinned chats some users saw go missing and prevent them from disappearing again

Search result sorting improved

Signal typing indicators send correctly

Muted chats with mentions count toward the unread indicators

Prevent app from opening at top left of screen

Better subscription messaging when you started your subscription on another platform

iMessage space should stay in the correct order

Only auto-transcribe voice notes

Fixed instances where chats you’ve already read, appear unread

July 20, 2025 - Beeper  Android - 4.28.2
